creator: mikes@indiana.edu
text:
M54PE MB P90 (1 CPU), 32MB RAM, NCR 825 SCSI (narrow differential,
external); Adaptec 1542B with 6X CD, Archive 4586NP changer (BT
firmware) use of "chio status" does not seem to use bounce buffers
(kernel compiled with bounce buffers) and results in above error

How-To-Repeat: execute "chio status"

Note:  same system works OK with 2940 (2944 for drives, 2940 for
tape; does not work with 2744 (EISA) for drives at all, bus lockup.
